CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '1992-09-20 20:38:40'), (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-15 15:20:10');
SELECT date_part('second', event_time) FROM events WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT e.event_id, date_part('hour', e.event_time) AS event_hour FROM events e WHERE date_part('hour', e.event_time) > 14;
SELECT e.event_id, (SELECT date_part('day', e1.event_time) FROM events e1 WHERE e1.event_id = e.event_id) AS event_day FROM events e;
SELECT e.event_id, (SELECT date_part('month', e1.event_time) FROM events e1 WHERE e1.event_id = e.event_id) AS event_month FROM events e WHERE date_part('year', e.event_time) = 1992;
CREATE TABLE detailed_events (event_id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP, organizer_id INT);
INSERT INTO detailed_events VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '1992-09-20 20:38:40', 100), (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-01-15 15:20:10', 200);
SELECT de.organizer_id, COUNT(de.event_id) AS total_events, date_part('minute', de.event_time) FROM detailed_events de GROUP BY de.organizer_id, date_part('minute', de.event_time);
SELECT date_part('year', e.event_time) AS event_year, COUNT(e.event_id) FROM events e GROUP BY event_year HAVING event_year > 1990;
